Senior Backend / Platform Engineer (DevOps)

About the role
We are hiring a backend platform engineer to own the reliability and scale of our
microservices platform. You will design services, harden our CI/CD pipelines, and
run our container orchestration in production.

Responsibilities
- Design and operate microservices and REST/gRPC APIs handling high traffic.
- Own our Kubernetes clusters and Docker-based build/deploy workflows.
- Manage cloud infrastructure as code with Terraform on AWS.
- Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (automated test, build, deploy).
- Improve observability, on-call, and incident response.

Required qualifications
- 3+ years building backend services in Go, Python, or Java.
- Strong experience with Kubernetes and Docker in production.
- Hands-on Terraform and AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, EKS).
- Experience designing and scaling PostgreSQL and event streaming (Kafka).
- Solid CI/CD and Linux fundamentals.

Nice to have
- Experience with gRPC and service meshes.
- Exposure to machine learning platforms.
